title: AEP v1.1 A5 Recurrence Tier Counter
description: v1.1 A5 amendment (STRONGLY PLAUSIBLE × CONTEXT-BOUND PATTERN). Two-agent convergence (curator + adversary implicit). Integer rt_count per claim (1=receipt, 2=memory, 3=rule/hook/test). Operator heuristic: 1st mistake = receipt; 2nd recurrence = memory promotion; 3rd recurrence = rule/hook/test promotion. Composes_with: sec02 truth-tags (recurrence drives promotion tier), v1.0.3 RegexicalCue (cues tally per-lesson recurrences).

rt_count.description: Number of observed recurrences. 1 = receipt-only. 2 = memory-promotion threshold. 3 = rule/hook/test promotion threshold. >3 = doctrine slot candidate.

tier_label.description: Tier derived from rt_count via the operator heuristic. receipt = rt_count==1; memory = rt_count==2; rule_hook_test = rt_count==3; doctrine_candidate = rt_count>3.

observation_artifact_ids.description: Artifact IDs where the claim was re-observed. Sec73.5 audit-replay anchor.

promotion_action_triggered_at_rt_count.description: rt_count at which a promotion action (hook/rule/test write) was triggered. null if no promotion fired yet.
